'''pagama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dykephobia|dykephobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dykephobia|dykephobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pagama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægæmæth|pægæmæth]] || [[word:pægæmæj|pægæmæj]] || [[word:pægæmæsh|pægæmæsh]] || [[word:pægæmæ|pægæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagagamath|pagagamath]] || [[word:pagagamaj|pagagamaj]] || [[word:pagagamash|pagagamash]] || [[word:pagagama|pagagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagamath|pagamath]] || [[word:pagamaj|pagamaj]] || [[word:pagamash|pagamash]] || [[word:pagama|pagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagafmafth|pagafmafth]] || [[word:pagafmafj|pagafmafj]] || [[word:pagafmafsh|pagafmafsh]] || [[word:pagafmaf|pagafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagamatha|pagamatha]] || [[word:pagamaja|pagamaja]] || [[word:pagamasha|pagamasha]] || [[word:pagamaka|pagamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagamath|pagamath]] || [[word:pagamaj|pagamaj]] || [[word:pagamash|pagamash]] || [[word:pagama|pagama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagamathal|pagamathal]] || [[word:pagamajal|pagamajal]] || [[word:pagamashal|pagamashal]] || [[word:pagamakal|pagamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagamaathatha|pagamaathatha]] || [[word:pagamaajaja|pagamaajaja]] || [[word:pagamaashasha|pagamaashasha]] || [[word:pagamaaka|pagamaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagamathan|pagamathan]] || [[word:pagamajan|pagamajan]] || [[word:pagamashan|pagamashan]] || [[word:pagamakan|pagamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagamathaoro|pagamathaoro]] || [[word:pagamajaoro|pagamajaoro]] || [[word:pagamashaoro|pagamashaoro]] || [[word:pagamakaoro|pagamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
